name: Clever K-12 EdTech SSO & Rostering API
what_it_does: Clever REST API for K-12 EdTech single sign-on (SSO) and rostering platform. Enables AI agents to retrieve rostered student, teacher, and section data synced from district SIS systems, handle SSO authentication flows for EdTech applications, access district and school hierarchy data, retrieve course and class assignments, manage student-teacher-section relationships, integrate with PowerSchool, Infinite Campus, and other SIS platforms, and connect EdTech applications to district identity infrastructure.
use_cases: Retrieving rostered student and class data for EdTech applications from integration agents
Handling SSO authentication flows from identity management agents
Accessing district and school hierarchy for multi-tenant EdTech from provisioning agents
Syncing student enrollment data from SIS to EdTech platforms from rostering agents
not_for: Higher education without K-12 SIS rostering workflows
Corporate identity management without EdTech SSO context
Non-EdTech applications without school district identity integration
best_when: An EdTech application vendor or school district wants to provide seamless SSO and rostering for K-12 students and teachers, integrating with district SIS systems via Clever's data layer.
avoid_when: FERPA+COPPA: Student roster and identity data is FERPA-protected. Data for students under 13 requires COPPA compliance and parental consent for third-party EdTech sharing. District data sharing agreements mandatory. EdTech vendors must comply with FERPA as school officials.

auth.notes: Clever uses OAuth 2.0 for all API access. Instant Login (SSO) and Data API for rostering. District-granted permissions model — districts approve EdTech applications before data access. Scopes aligned to student, teacher, and section data. Well-documented developer portal with SDKs.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free for EdTech companies to integrate; districts pay for premium features
pricing.paid_tiers: Districts pay subscription; EdTech vendors access free with district approval
pricing.notes: San Francisco, California. Founded 2012. Acquired by Kahoot! 2021. Platform used by 75,000+ schools. 65%+ of US K-12 students have Clever access. Market leader for K-12 SSO and rostering. EdTech vendors must apply to Clever Library to be listed. Free for EdTech vendors to integrate.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: FERPA+COPPA: Student identity data — district approval required before API access granted
No public MCP server — excellent OAuth2 REST API with SDKs and developer portal
District approval model — cannot access district data without district opt-in
Students under 13 require COPPA parent consent — EdTech vendor is responsible for compliance
Clever Library listing required for EdTech marketplace — approval process can take weeks
Instant Login (SSO) and Data API are separate flows — choose per integration use case
agent_readiness.security_notes: K-12 student identity and roster data. FERPA, COPPA, SOC2. OAuth2 scoped. US data residency. District approval required. Children's data protections.

security_score_components.security_notes: K-12 student identity data. FERPA, COPPA, SOC2. OAuth2. US data residency. District approval required.
